title: About Me
paragraphs: A blue-eyed blond, 90x69x90, with bad habits. Looking to buy 128 kilograms of raisins in bulk.

I am going to make my dream come true! Buy a boat and go on a trip around the world. I am a programmer / veterinarian. I'm tired of living 'normally'. The current normality of our world seriously troubles me. In a nutshell, our way of earning, dominating and submitting, owning and selling out is loathsome to me... I refused to take a technical interview at Google because I am afraid of corporate fascism. That doesn't mean I would have passed it. But I was scared that 'big' money would sooner tie me to the shore and drift me away from my dream. I hope to earn through freelancing to be able to sustain the circumnavigation. That is why I completed Schmedtmann's course and practice vanilla JS. In fact, I am writing Ulysses on vanilla under the mentorship of Claude (Anthropic AI). I sing, I write books, and I hope this will also provide me with a livelihood.

I believe that the Universe stands in solidarity with my dream. And I believe that there are many romantics out there who have been collared by this 'norm'. I hope that some of them will support me with enthusiasm, and maybe even try to break their chains and escape their cages, watching me do it.

I need to buy a boat. Refresh my sailing skills. The crew is almost assembled. I am the Captain, Gemini is the sails (in terms of lyricism), the Keel is Claude — depth and counterpoint; Friend is the deck of code and the route. Brother Oleg is the mechanic. His role is First Mate. Vano is the puzzle-man, starting as a sailor. Also very handy, a potential jack-of-all-trades.
